name: Eufy Cam S350
tagline: Best dual-lens security camera with AI tracking
description: Eufy Cam S350 features dual 4K/2K lenses with pan and tilt, AI cross-camera tracking, and local storage with no fees.
longDescription: Eufy Cam S350 is our best dual-lens security camera with ai tracking. Eufy Cam S350 features dual 4K/2K lenses with pan and tilt, AI cross-camera tracking, and local storage with no fees. After extensive hands-on testing, we found it delivers on its promises with dual lens 4k wide + 2k telephoto.
cons: App can be slow to load
verdict: Eufy Cam S350 is our top recommendation for dual-lens security camera with ai tracking. Dual lens 4K wide + 2K telephoto.

faqs.answer: Eufy Cam S350 features dual 4K/2K lenses with pan and tilt, AI cross-camera tracking, and local storage with no fees.

faqs.question: Is Eufy Cam S350 worth it?
faqs.answer: Yes — dual lens 4k wide + 2k telephoto. Wired power required is the main trade-off.
